response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive staff-level software engineering experience with a strong track record in system design, full-stack development, and technical leadership. His current role directly involves AI-agent infrastructure, Model Context Protocol (MCP), and agentic workflows, which are highly relevant to this position. While his resume does not explicitly detail 8 years of dedicated AI solution development, his broad expertise in cloud platforms, data integration, and his proven ability to transition prototypes to production make him a compelling candidate for a Forward Deployed Engineer role.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level software engineering experience and technical leadership.
Direct and recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP, and agentic workflows.
Strong background in full-stack development, cloud platforms (AWS), and complex data integration.
concerns: Does not explicitly meet the 8+ years requirement for dedicated AI-driven solution development.
Lack of explicit mention of Python, which is a primary language for AI/ML.
Limited explicit experience with RAG architectures or LLM performance optimization techniques.
